programme.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
programme.desc: Prem, a free-spirited boy, falls in love with a young girl Jenny. However, when he learns that she is in love with her college sweetheart, Rahul, Prem sacrifices his love and helps Jenny to get married to the love of her life.

programme.title: Halla Bol
programme.desc: The Movie Club

programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend¡¯s house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Jaan-E-Mann: Let's Fall in Love... Again
programme.desc: To avoid paying a hefty alimony, Suhaan (Salman Khan) thinks of getting his ex-wife Pia (Preity Zinta) remarried. For that, he convinces Pia¡¯s simpleton college friend Agastya Rao (Akshay Kumar) that he can still marry his college crush. He then helps Agastya to woo Pia, but ends up falling in love with her all over again.

programme.title: Surya 420
programme.desc: A transgender man struggles to realise his sexual orientation while dealing with the social stigma and taboo related to gender transition in the society.

programme.title: Billa 2
programme.desc: Small-time diamond smuggler David befriends Goa-based gangster Abbasi. However, when David begins to build inroads with an international criminal, Abbasi is not happy.

programme.title: Jaanbaaz Commando
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Venghai
programme.desc: A respectable village head decides to keep his son away from the violent politics of rural life. However, fate intervenes, forcing the young man to not only return home, but also take up the sickle.

programme.title: Revenge Of Robert
programme.desc: Infamous killer doll Robert does battle with Hitler's henchmen aboard a train in Nazi Germany.

programme.title: The Landlord
programme.desc: Alyssa moves into a luxury apartment complex but is unaware she is being watched by her disturbed landlord, Robert, via hidden cameras. Robert will do anything to fill the void left by his estranged daughter--even if that means replacing her.

programme.title: Black Cobra
programme.desc: Sizwe Biko, an ordinary man with extraordinary skills as a martial artist. He wants nothing more than to live a simple life, but is thrust into a fight for his father's freedom, a leftover casualty of South Africa's former Apartheid mandates.

programme.title: Dead Mans Cards
programme.desc: When Tom's boxing career abruptly ends, he's offered a job as a door man at a run down night club, where he meets Paul, a volatile man with a history of violence. Soon it is unclear whether Tom has taken a step on the road to redemption, or finally hit the self-destruct button. Paul takes Tom under his wing to teach him the ropes, but he is soon at deadly odds with violent gangsters from the area.

programme.title: Revenge Of Robert
programme.desc: Infamous killer doll Robert does battle with Hitler's henchmen aboard a train in Nazi Germany.

programme.title: The Lease
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, Julia, a troubled woman, moves to Los Angeles with her new boyfriend. After settling into a new home, mysterious things begin to happen. It's not long before Julia becomes convinced that her demons have moved with her.

programme.title: Break A Leg
programme.desc: When Max's performance cannot compete with the producers bigger "names," he looks to cripple the competition.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: Vultan, leader of the flying Dactyl tribe, comes to Earth to retrieve his long-lost son.

programme.title: Supernova
programme.desc: A team of fellow scientists race against time to stop a prediction of apocalypse from coming true.

programme.title: Break A Leg
programme.desc: When Max's performance cannot compete with the producers bigger "names," he looks to cripple the competition.

programme.title: Supernova
programme.desc: A team of fellow scientists race against time to stop a prediction of apocalypse from coming true.

programme.title: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: A modern aircraft carrier is thrown back in time to 1941 near Hawaii, just hours before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Rail Kings
programme.desc: An irresponsible preppie, Preston West, is presumed to have murdered his parents for a sizeable inheritance, so he flees to find the real killer, Phantom 13, a crazed freight train hobo! Riding speeding boxcars, Preston encounters hostile train yards, vicious railroad cops, hidden hobo jungles, mysterious Lacy, the notorious Baron and his colorful Hobo Gang. In a surprise ending, Preston finally confronts Phantom 13. Based on the controversial Hobo Times books.

programme.title: Midnight Ride
programme.desc: A house wife just left her cop husband, when she picks up Justin Mckay she'll wish she never did as she's plunged into a nightmare and the grip of a psychotic killer.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.desc: Did you know that a group of young rabbits are called kittens?

programme.title: TPC Theatre
programme.desc: Lord Covenington and Master Zues explore unlikely friendships, pets in school, and get quizzed on elephants.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: This mother is trying to regain custody of her daughter which she was convicted of abusing and neglecting. But Steve will not let her even get close to that child.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Amanda is here because she's trying to save her marriage to Bo. Bo's not sure if he's the father of her child and needs a DNA test to prove the truth. Plus, Julie says that she believes she's being cheated on by Stevie.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: A couple's children are taken away after the six-month-old nearly dies from having a baby wipe lodged in her windpipe Shawn says his daughter came home with severe bruising on her body after staying with her mother and told him her mother beat her.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Maria is convinced that her son's ex-girlfriend Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says that Maria is racist and angry because her granddaughter is being raised in a Hispanic household

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Samantha believes that her 3 year old daughter was molested by her ex-boyfriend's brother, Chad. Chad denies sexually abusing the child and even took a voice stress test to prove his innocence. Now he wants to clear his name.

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kandie was the guardian of Katie's son who died at only 9 months. Katie thinks that Kandie was involved with his death, but Kandie claims she cared more for him than Katie did and even accuses her of selling him for $23 to her! Who's responsible for the tragic death of the child?

programme.title: Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Ashley's boyfriend Tyjuan thinks his abuse is justified because he suspects her of cheating and doubts the paternity of their five kids! Then, Natasha gave birth two weeks ago, but fears that the father is her rapist and not her husband Daniel!

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The men bail when they see bats and guns. Things get heated for Matt and Sonia before they start a repo job.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Giraffe Road Trip
programme.desc: The family prepares Croc One, Steve Irwin's research ship, for a mission to release an endangered sea turtle back to the wild Scarlett the giraffe reunites with her grandmother Grub the wild echidna is released from the Zoo's Wildlife Hospital.

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Needles the porcupine gets a new mate, and the Guar await their new calves.

programme.title: Mystery of the Lost Islands: Deadliest Moments

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: When Kip the young silver langur falls ill, he must be nursed back to health Cora, the white-naped crane chick, is relocated and introduced to her potential mate giraffes Jigsaw and Zizi are paired for breeding.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln S1 Ep 25
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Ep 21
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 21
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: The Secrets of Honey Hills
programme.desc: Honey Hills is a small seaside town where all kind of animals live. It' s a good neighbourhood. However, mysterious and inexplicable events sometimes cause misunderstandings among neighbours. Then, genius detective Sophie the Owl together with her young assistant Chirp the Squirrel take up the investigation.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It' s countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer' s back is turned.

programme.title: Cutie Cubies
programme.desc: An animation series about the adventures of four aliens - Cubies: Captain, Boatswain, Navigator, and Doctor. Having arrived on our planet and disguised as representatives of the local flora and fauna of the cubic form: a yellow chicken, a red rabbit, a blue aquarium and a bush of green grass, they are learning the diverse phenomena of our planet Earth.

programme.title: Simba The Lion King Ep 19
programme.desc: The Lion King is shot by poachers, as part of Shere Khan the Bengal tiger's plot to overthrow the king from his throne. Young Simba, son of the Lion King, suspects something strange and subconsciously senses that the Tiger will one day be his greatest enemy. Simba and his two sisters are adopted into a wolf pack.

programme.desc: GG Bond and Super Q were Grade 4 students from High Expectation Primary School. The two competitors had different hobbies, different characteristics and different shapes, but they did share something in common. Both of them dreamt to become a super hero!

programme.title: Robinhood EP 16
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Rock The Park
programme.desc: Jack and Colton search for one of the most scarce resources in the park… water.

programme.title: Rock The Park

programme.desc: The beautiful Bosa Old Town finds itself in Alghero To Oristano, an area strongly influenced by Spanish culture. The city is generally considered to have been founded in 1102. However, long before the Christian era, the Phoenicians set up a trading post o"&"n this exposed bay in western Sardinia.

programme.title: Mir Castle Complex, Belarus
programme.desc: Located in the small town center, Mir Castle's complex is one of the earliest monuments to exist to this day and the most essential. This centuries-old Castle, reflected magnificently in an adjoining pond, resembles a building straight out of fairy tales. The common name 'mir' shared by the Castle and the town literally translates to 'peace' this justifies the fact that the Castle's sole purpose was built to bring harmony and peace to the region, followed by the signing of several peace treaties.

programme.title: Jakarta Old Town, Indonesia, Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Jakarta,Indonesia one of the Old Town of the world heritage. And today shall take you around Jakarta Old Town, also known as Kota Tua.

programme.title: Jakarta Old Town, Indonesia, Part2
programme.desc: is documentary series about the old town of Jakarta. Often referred to as Kota Tua Jakarta or Old Batavia, the old center is a neighborhood in the central city of Jakarta.

programme.title: Village Baduy, Indonesia
programme.desc: The Baduy village is in a remote area on the slopes of the Kendeng Mountains, surrounded by a verdant atmosphere. We are in Indonesia.

programme.title: Budapest Inner City Mother Church of the Blessed Virgin, Hungary
programme.desc: Budapest Inner City Parish Church, officially the Church of the Blessed Virgin Mary in Budapest, is a Church raised on a the ruins of a Roman settlement time.

programme.title: Budapest life from Roman times onward Hungary
Vannes Old City, France
programme.desc: Old City Walls of Vannes are fortifications built between the 3rd and 17th centuries to protect Vannes' city. It is located on the Gulf of Morbihan at the mouth of two rivers, the Marle and the Vincin, around 450 km southwest of Paris.

programme.title: Cathedral La Major, Marseille, France
programme.desc: Just on the outskirts of the delightfully vibrant Marseille, lies what locals affectionately call the Cathedral of La Major. An impressive Roman Catholic cathedral and basilica minor, this astounding architectural gem stands guard over the Old-Port of Marseille. It is a respected, protected much loved-national monument of France: The Cathedral of Sainte-Marie-Majeure, or The Major as locals called it.

programme.title: The Giza Pyramid Complex, Egypt
programme.desc: Around the ancient capital city of Memphis, in Egypt, located just south of modern-day Cairo, are the greatest and strangest structures ever created by humankind, The Egyptian Pyramids.

programme.title: Tallinn town, Estonia
programme.desc: Entering now in the Old Town of Tallinn, we understand how it became the best-preserved medieval city in Northern Europe, boasting Gothic spires, winding cobblestone streets, and enchanting architecture.Tallinn, the capital of Estonia, is a city out of a fairytale with centuries of history and traditions.

programme.title: The Palace Museum (The Forbidden City), China (Part 2)
programme.desc: The Forbidden City, also known as the Palace Museum, is located in the center of Beijing. From 1368 to 1911, it was the Chinese imperial Palace of the Ming and Qing dynasties. It is a World Heritage Site as one of the best-preserved ancient wooden palace complexes. A documentary series in two episodes.

programme.title: Plovdiv, The city on seven hills, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Few places have a history like Plovdiv. Its hilly landscape bears the marks of many great civilizations – from the mysterious Thracian tribes, to ancient Greece and Persia, to the Roman Empire, all the way to the Bulgarian Empire, the Ottomans and even Tsarist Russia. In fact, Plovdiv is one of the oldest cities in Europe.

programme.title: Kaleto Archaeological Complex & Vrachanski Balkan Nature Park, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Located in northwestern Bulgaria, in the Vratsa Province, Mezdra is a small, picturesque town sitting along the left bank of the Iskar River. Discover the historical heritage of a living city: the Kaleto Archaeological Complex and the Vrachanski Balkan Nature Park. They are containing karst landscapes and habitats with more than 600 caves.

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones
programme.desc: The group of iconic anglers reunite for a week of fishing & camaraderie in Belize. Bill Klyn & Tom McGuane fish for snook, Lori-Ann Murphy & Zach Gilford go after bonefish & Michael Keaton & Tom Brokaw pursue permit & tarpon.,

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones
programme.desc: The team of anglers cast into the flats off the coast of Belize in pursuit of bonefish. Tom Brokaw & Bill Klyn casts from a boat, McGuane & Yvon Chouninard try their luck wading & Michael Keaton & Lori-Ann Murphy use both methods.,

programme.title: Buccaneers and Bones
programme.desc: The group of anglers continue their weekend of fishing out of El Pescador Lodge & the Belize River Lodge. ~Tom McGuane experiences a memorable fight with a giat tarpon & we join up with angling legend Stu Apte in Florida.,

programme.title: Modern Explorers
programme.desc: The Alaskan mountains in spring are mind blowing. Jokke and his friends board the helicopter to go speed flying. It may look peaceful but it's very dangerous.,

programme.title: Modern Explorers
programme.desc: Jokke, Niccolo and Espen travel to China. They participate in a wingsuit flying competition. The platform they jump from is just like the mountains: gigantic.,

programme.title: Modern Explorers

programme.desc: A 1957 Ford Thunderbird gets the restoration treatment with new paint, interior, and a rebuilt V8 motor.,

programme.title: Geared Up
programme.desc: An ultra rare 1957 Mercedes Benz 300 SL Roadster is resto-modded using a modern Mercedes Benz SLK 230 as a donor vehicle.,

programme.title: Something in the Water
programme.desc: Chronicles singer-songwriter Steve Azar's endeavor to record his album Down at the Liquor Store at the historic Club Ebony in Indianola, Mississippi with a group of storied musicians.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: In the middle of rural Maine, Paul and Nick create an outside barbeque for the family of John Mann, an eighth generation Ulster-Scot immigrant. The Manns are true frontier-people, and completely self sufficient from their land.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Chefs Paul Rankin and Nick Nairn are in Lexington, Virginia to cook for descendants of the Ulster-Scots Lewis family who settled in the area in the 18th century. Along the way they visit a heritage pig farmer, taste some sparkling cider and they discover some delicious goat's cheese in the heart of Virginia's Piedmont region where Paul has a close encounter with a friendly goat…

programme.title: Playgrounds
programme.desc: See some of the best playgrounds in the USA through the lens of athletes.

programme.title: USA Through Music
programme.desc: American cities have long played a starring role in its music. Notable musicians tell personal stories about how their favorite cities inspire their work.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: Chicago is a city of both innovation and tradition. From immigrants cooking up classics to world-renowned chefs creating new concoctions with modern technology, Andrew gets a taste of Chicago's diverse food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: Andrew takes to the road to sample the Pennsylvania staples most people never hear about. A Japanese superstar chef cooks up poisonous sexual organs and a family boils up every part of the pig.

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.desc: Will stares in amazement at the largest airplane ever built - Howard Hughes' "Spruce Goose" in McMinnville, Oregon samples all things strange at Portland's Peculiarium marvels at Marv's incredible collection of Farm Toys in Monroe admires the aluminum siding at Houston's Beer Can House and then pulls over for gas station memorabilia at Classical Gas in Embudo, New Mexico. Fill 'er up!

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.desc: Will finds himself in the middle of an ice cream catastrophe at Ben & Jerry's Factory in Waterbury, Vermont mingles with mermaids at the underwater show in Weeki Wachee, Florida achieves speeds of 5 miles per hour on the cog wheel train to the summit of Mt. Washington, New Hampshire buys new kicks at a Sneaker convention in Cleveland and marvels at Bug Art portraits at a museum in St. Johnsbury, Vermont.
